title: Scientific/Expert Advisory Panels - Canada.ca
content:
## Scientific/Expert Advisory Panels

## Scientific Advisory Bodies
For materials from past meetings of active panels and panels that are dormant, or whose mandate is completed, please contact Policy Bureau Enquires for additional information.
Scientific / Expert Advisory Panel
Bioequivalence Requirements for Fentanyl Transdermal Delivery Systems ( SAP-FTDS )
Selective COX-2 Inhibitor NSAIDS ( EAP-COX-2 )
External Working Group on the Registration and Disclosure of Clinical Trial Information ( EWG-CT )
Isotretinoin ( SAP-I )
Neuropathic Pain ( SAP-NP )
Nonprescription Paediatric Cough & Cold Medications ( SAP-NPCCM )
Schedule of the Food and Drugs Act (SAP-Sch-A)
Selective Serotonin Reuptake Inhibitors and Serotonin/Norepinephrine Reuptake Inhibitors ( SAP-SSRI / SNRI )
Special Access Programme: Expert Advisory Panel
